title: Senior Software Engineer, Infrastructure
requirements: 5+ years of experience in infrastructure or platform engineering
Strong proficiency in Go or similar systems language
Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration at scale
responsibilities: Design and build scalable infrastructure for Figma's core platform
Improve reliability, performance, and cost-efficiency of cloud systems
Partner with product engineering teams to solve infrastructure challenges
descriptionText: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Infrastructure team...
descriptionHtml: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Infrastructure team...

title: Product Designer
requirements: 3+ years of experience in product design
Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
Experience collaborating with engineers and PMs in agile teams
responsibilities: Own design for a key product surface area from concept to launch
Conduct user research to inform design decisions
Collaborate with cross-functional partners to ship high-quality experiences
descriptionText: We are looking for a talented Product Designer to join our team...
descriptionHtml: We are looking for a talented Product Designer to join our team...

title: Staff Data Engineer
requirements: 7+ years of experience in data engineering
Proficiency in Spark, Python, and SQL
Experience building large-scale data pipelines on cloud platforms
responsibilities: Architect and implement scalable data pipelines for retail analytics
Mentor junior engineers and establish best practices
Partner with data science teams to productionize ML models
descriptionText: Walmart is seeking a Staff Data Engineer to join our growing data platform team...
descriptionHtml: Walmart is seeking a Staff Data Engineer to join our growing data platform team...
